hadiths.ar: 2164  - وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم
hadiths.en:
It has been narrated: "It is the right hand of Allah {SWT} on His earth, with which 
He shakes hands with His creation."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 13, p. 339 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2163
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٦٣

hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: "The water of Zamzam is a cure 
for whatever it is drunk for."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 20, p. 580 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 13, p. 
245 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 63, p. 450 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 96, p. 245 • Mustadrak Al-Wasail, Vol. 9, p. 347 
• Mustadrak Al-Wasail, Vol. 17, p. 17 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2164
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٦٤

hadiths.ar: 2166  - وَّ كَّان َّ رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ : ي َّسْي َّهْذِى  مَّاءَّ ر َّمْز َّمَّ وَّ هُّوَّ ن ِالْمَّذِي ن َّه ِ
hadiths.en:
It has been narrated: "Whoever drinks their fill from the water of Zamzam will 
be granted healing through it, and an illness will be repelled from them."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 12, p. 79 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 13, p. 245 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2165
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٦٥

hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace and blessings be upon him and his family, 
used to request Zamzam water while he was in Madinah.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2166
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٦٦

hadiths.ar:
2168  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ عَّلِى  ُّ ن ْن ُّ إَّلْحُّسَّي ْن ِ عَّلَّي ْهِمَّا إَّلس َّلاَّم لاَّن ِكَّه ُّ ق َّي ُّس َّق  َّغُّ ق ِي هِ  
ن ِالْأ ِي ح َّاب ِ.
hadiths.en:
It has been narrated: "When the pilgrim performs Sa’y between Safa and 
Marwah, they are cleansed of their sins."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 12, p. 245 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 13, p. 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2167
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٦٧

hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Al -Husayn {a.s} said: "The one who performs Sa’y between Safa 
and Marwah is interceded for by the angels, and their intercession is accepted."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 12, p. 245 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 13, p. 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2168
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٦٨

hadiths.ar:
2170   -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم ا عِن ْذَّ إَّلْحَّطِي مِ ق َّاق ْعَّلْ 
ق َّا ِن  َّهُّ إ َّق ْص َّلُّ ن ُّق ْعَّه ٍ عَّلَّى وَّج ْهِ إَّلْأ َّرْض ِ    
وإلحطي م ما ن ي ن  ن اب  إلن ي ث  وإلحح ز إلأ سوذ وهو إلموص غ إلذ ى  ق ي ه ي اب  إلله عز  وج ل على إ ذم علي ه إلسلام، ون عذة إلصلاة   
ق ى  إلحح ز إ ق ص ل، ون عذ إلحح ز ما ن ي ن  إلزكن  إلعزإق ى  ون اب  إلن ي ث  وهو إلموص غ إلذ ى  كان  ق ي ه إلمق ام، ون عذة ج لف  إلمق ام  
جي ث  هو إلساعه ، وما ق زب  من  إلن ي ث  ق هو إ ق ص ل   إ لأ إ ن ه لأ ي ح ور  لك  إ ن  ي صلى  ركعي ى  طوإف  إلن ساء وع ي زة إ لأ ج لف  إلمق ام  
جي ث  هو إلساعه .
hadiths.en:
It has been narrated: "Whoever wishes to increase their wealth should 
prolong their standing on Safa and Marwah."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Kafi, Vol. 4, p. 433 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 13, p. 927 • Wasa’il 
Al-Shi’a, Vol. 13, p. 479 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2169
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٦٩

hadiths.ar:
2171   -  وَّ مَّن ْ صَّل َّى ق ِى  إَّلْمَّسْح ِذِ إَّلْحَّزَّإمِ صَّلاَّة ً وَّإجِذَّة ً ق َّن ِلَّ إَّلل َّهُّ عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل َّ مِن ْهُّ كُّل َّ صَّلاَّة ٍ صَّلا َّهَّا و  كُّل َّ صَّلاَّة ٍ 
ي ُّصَّلِّي هَّا إ ِلَّى إ َّن ْ ي َّمُّوب
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} said: "If you are able to pray all your 
prayers, obligatory and non -obligatory, at Al -Hatim, then do so, for it is the most 
virtuous spot on the face of the earth."   
[AL SADUQ] 
Al-Hatim is the area between the door of the Kaaba and the Black Stone. It is the place 
where Allah {SWT}, Mighty and Majestic, accepted Adam's repentance, peace be upon 
him. After Al -Hatim, the next most virtuous place for prayer is inside the Hijr (area 
enclosed by the semi -circular wall). Following that, it is the space between the Iraqi 
Corner and the doo r of the Kaaba, which was the original location of the Station of 
Ibrahim. Next is the current location of the Station of Ibrahim, and the closer to th e 
House (Kaaba), the better. However, it is obligatory to pray the two Rak'ahs of Tawaf 
al-Nisa and other related prayers specifically behind the Station of Ibrahim in its 
current location.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2170
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٠

hadiths.ar: 2172  - وَّ إَّلص َّلاَّة ُّ ق ِي هِ ن ِمِان َّه ِ إ َّلْف ِ صَّلاَّة ٍ
hadiths.en:
Whoever prays a single prayer in the Sacred Mosque, Allah {SWT}, Mighty and 
Majestic, accepts from them every prayer they have performed and every prayer they 
will perform until their death.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2171
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧١

hadiths.ar: 2173  - وَّ إ ِذ َّإ إ َّج َّذ َّ إَّلن  َّاسُّ مَّوَّإطِن َّهُّمْ ن ِمِن ًى ن َّاذَّى مُّن َّاذٍ مِن ْ ق ِن َّلِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل َّ إ ِن ْ إ َّرَّذْي ُّمْ إ َّن ْ إ َّرْص ى ق َّق َّذْ رَّص ِي ث ُّ.
hadiths.en:
"And a single prayer in it (the Sacred Mosque) is equivalent to one hundred 
thousand prayers."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2172
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٢

hadiths.en:
"And when the people settle in their places at Mina, a caller from Allah {SWT}, 
Mighty and Majestic, announces: 'If you desire My pleasure, then I am pleased with 
you.'"  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Kafi, Vol. 4, p. 262 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 12, p. 224 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2173
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٣

hadiths.ar:
2175  -  وَّ رُّوِى ن ِى  ق ِى  هَّذ َّإ إَّلْمَّكَّان ِ ق ِى   
كُّلِّ ج َّمْسِ سِن ِي ن َّ لَّمَّحْزُّوم
hadiths.en:
It has been narrated: "When the people take their places at Mina, a caller 
announces to them: 'If you knew in whose presence you have settled, you would be 
certain of receiving abundance after forgiveness.'"   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Kafi, Vol. 4, p. 256 • Al-Kafi, Vol. 4, p. 263 • Al-Wafi, 
Vol. 12, p. 224 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 11, p. 94 • General Hadith Qudsi, Vol. 1, p. 707 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2174
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٤

hadiths.ar: 2176  - وَّ ق َّذْ صَّل َّى ق ِى  مَّسْح ِذِ إَّلْح َّي ْف ِ ن ِمِن ًى سَّن ْعُّمِان َّه ِ ن َّن ِى
hadiths.en:
It has been narrated: "The Almighty, Glorious is His Majesty, says: 'A servant 
whom I have blessed and bestowed favors upon, yet does not visit Me in this place (the 
Kaaba) at least once every five years, is indeed deprived.'"   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 12, p. 256 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 11, p. 
139 • General Hadith Qudsi, Vol. 1, p. 707 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2175
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٥

hadiths.ar:
2177  - وَّ كَّان َّ مَّسْح ِذُّ رَّسُّولِ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ عَّلَّى عَّهْذِةِ عِن ْذَّ إَّلْمَّن َّارَّة ِ إَّل َّي ِى  ق ِى  وَّسَّظِ إَّلْمَّسْح ِذِ وَّ ق َّوْق ُّهَّا 
إ ِلَّى إَّلْق ِن ْلَّه ِ ن َّحْوَّ ي َّلاَّي ِي ن َّ ذ ِرَّإعاً وَّ عَّن ْ ي َّمِي ن ِهَّا وَّ عَّن ْ ي َّسَّارِهَّا وَّ ج َّلْق ِهَّا ن َّحْوُّ  ذ َّلِك
hadiths.en:
"And seven hundred Prophets have prayed in the Mosque of Al-Khaif at Mina."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2176
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٦

hadiths.ar:
2178  -  وَّ مَّن ْ صَّل َّى ق ِى  مَّسْح ِذِ مِن ًى مِان َّه َّ رَّكْعَّه ٍ ق َّن ْلَّ إ َّن ْ ي َّح ْزُّح َّ مِن ْهُّ عَّذَّلَّث ْ عِن َّاذَّة َّ سَّن ْعِي ن َّ عَّاماً وَّ مَّن ْ س ن  َّحَّ إَّلل َّهَّ ق ِى   
مَّسْح ِذِ مِن ًى مِان َّه َّ ي َّسْن ِي حَّه ٍ كَّي َّث َّ إَّلل َّهُّ عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل َّ لَّهُّ إ َّج ْزَّ عِي ْق ِ رَّق َّن َّه ٍ وَّ مَّن ْ هَّل َّلَّ   إَّلل َّهَّ ق ِي هِ مِان َّه َّ مَّز َّة ٍ عَّذَّلَّث ْ إ ِجْي َّاءَّ ن َّسَّمَّه ٍ  
وَّ مَّن ْ جَّمِذَّ إَّلل َّهَّ عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل َّ ق ِي هِ مِان َّه َّ مَّز َّة ٍ عَّذَّلَّث ْ إ َّج ْزَّ ج َّزَّإح ِ إَّلْعِزَّإق َّي ْن ِ ق ِى  سَّن ِي لِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّز  َّ  وَّ ج َّل
hadiths.en:
"The Mosque of the Messenger of Allah {SWT}, peace and blessings be upon him 
and his family, during his time, extended from the minaret in the middle of the mosque 
and beyond it toward the Qibla for about thirty cubits, as well as to its right, left, and 
behind it, approximately the same distance."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2177
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٧

hadiths.en:
Whoever prays one hundred Rak’ahs in the Mosque of Mina before leaving it 
will receive the reward equivalent to seventy years of worship.  
Whoever glorifies Allah {SWT} one hundred times in the Mosque of Mina, Allah {SWT}, 
Mighty and Majestic, will record for them the reward of freeing a slave.  
Whoever declares the oneness of Allah {SWT} (La ilaha illa Allah {SWT}) one hundred times 
in it will have the reward of giving life to a soul.  
And whoever praises Allah {SWT} (Alhamdulillah) one hundred times in it will receive the 
reward equivalent to the revenue of the two Iraqs (al-'Iraqayn) spent in the way of Allah 
{SWT}, Mighty and Majestic.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2178
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٨

hadiths.ar:
2180  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إ َّن ُّو ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم ح َّاب َّ إَّلل َّهُّ لَّهُّ ق َّا َّم َّا إَّلْن َّز ُّ  
ق َّي ُّسْي َّح َّاب ُّ لَّهُّ ق ِى  إ ج ِزَّي ِهِ وَّ ذُّن ْي َّاةُّ وَّ إ َّم َّا إَّلْق َّاج ِزُّ ق َّي ُّسْي َّح َّاب ُّ لَّهُّ ق ِ ى  ذُّن ْي َّاةُّ.
hadiths.en:
"The pilgrim, when they stand at Arafat, is cleansed of their sins."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2179
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٧٩

hadiths.ar:
2181  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ ع لِأ َّهْلِ ي ِلْك َّ إَّلْكُّورَّة ِ 
مِن َّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ وَّ مَّا مِن ْ رَّج ُّلٍ وَّق َّف َّ ن ِعَّزَّق َّه َّ مِن ْ إ َّهْلِ ن َّي ْث ٍ مِن َّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ إ ِ لأ َّ ع َّق َّزَّ إَّلل َّهُّ لِأ َّهْلِ ذ َّلِك َّ إَّلْن َّي ْث ِ مِن َّ إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِي ن َّ.
hadiths.en:
Abu Ja’far {a.s} said: "No one, whether righteous or sinful, stands on those 
mountains (at Arafat) without Allah {SWT} answering their prayer. As for the righteous, 
their supplication is answered for both their Hereafter and their worldly life. As for the 
sinful, their supplication is answered for their worldly life."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Kafi, Vol. 4, p. 262 • Awaali al-La’aali, Part 2, p. 93 • 
Al-Wafi, Vol. 12, p. 222 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 11, p. 160 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, Vol. 13, p. 545 • Al-Fusul al-
Muhimmah, Part 2, p. 180 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2180
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٨٠

hadiths.ar:
2182  -  وَّ سَّمِغَّ عَّلِى  ُّ ن ْن ُّ إَّلْحُّسَّي ْن ِ عَّلَّي ْهِمَّا إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ : ي َّوْمَّ عَّزَّق َّه َّ سَّان ِلاً ي َّسْا َّلُّ إَّلن  َّاسَّ ق َّق َّالَّ لَّه ك َّ إ َّ ع َّي ْزَّ إَّلل َّهِ ي َّسْا َّلُّ  
ق ِى  هَّذ َّإ إَّلْي َّوْمِ إ ِن  َّهُّ لَّي ُّزْج َّى لِمَّا ق ِى  ن ُّطُّون ِ إَّلْحَّن َّالَّى ق ِى  هَّذ َّإ إَّلْي َّوْمِ إ َّن ْ ي َّكُّون َّ سَّعِي ذإً
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} said: "There is no man from a region 
who stands at Arafat among the believers without Allah {SWT} forgiving the believers of 
that region. And there is no man from a household who stands at Arafat among the 
believers without Allah {SWT} forgiving the believers of that household."   
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 12, p. 222 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2181
reference.location: Volume 2 › CHAPTER ON VIRTUES OF HAJJ
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٦٣، ح ٢١٨١

hadiths.ar:
2183  - وَّ كَّان َّ إ َّن ُّو ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ إ ِذ َّإ كَّان َّ ي َّوْمُّ عَّزَّق َّه َّ لَّمْ ي َّزُّذ َّ سَّان ِلاً  
ومن  إ عي ق  عن ذإ له عس ي ه  ي وم عزق ه  ق ا ن ه ي ح ز ى  عن  إلعن ذ جح ه  إلأسلام ، وي كي ث  للسي ذ إ ج زإن  ي وإب  إلعي ق  وي وإب  إلحح .   
وروى  ق ى  إلعن ذ إ ذ إ إ عي ق  ي وم عزق ه  إ ن ه إ ذ إ إ ذرك  إ جذ إلموق ق ي ن  ق ق ذ إ ذرك  إلحح . وإ عط م إلن اس ج زما من  إ هل عزق اب  إلذ ى  
ي ن صزف  من  عزق اب  وهو ي ط ن  إ ن ه لم ي ع ق ز له ي عن ى  إلذ ى  ي ق ن ظ من  رجمه  إلله عز  وج ل.
hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Al-Husayn {a.s} heard a beggar asking people on the Day of Arafah. 
He said to him: "Woe to you! Are you asking anyone other than Allah {SWT} on this day? 
Indeed, it is hoped that even what is in the wombs of pregnant women will be destined 
for happiness on this day."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 2  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 2, Ch. 63, H. 2182
